summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a stellar 1994 second set, highlighted by an emotional Stella Blue and the epic He's Gone > Matilda Jam.
review: Both reviewers give this show five stars, praising the superb second‑set performance – especially the heartfelt rendition of Stella Blue and the marathon He's Gone into Matilda Jam. The recording is a digital soundboard (dsbd) source with no reported flaws, making it clean and enjoyable throughout. A video of Lovelight > Stella Blue > Lovelight is also available on YouTube.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both the musical performance and the recording quality across two detailed 5‑star reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No issues mentioned; dsbd format implies a clear, well‑balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight the second set as a winner, noting an emotional Stella Blue and a lengthy, flowing He's Gone into Matilda Jam that showcases the band's improvisational strength.
